channel.title: Travel on Abhinav Agarwalla
channel.description: Recent content in Travel on Abhinav Agarwalla

item.title: Introduced AutoTLS in libp2p(-py)
item.description:
Extended the TLS security module in libp2p(-py) to fetch CA authorized TLS certificates using the libp2p Auto-TLS client specification, rather than using self-signed ones.

This will enable protocol execution via web-transport and browsers for libp2p(-py).

PR: https://github.com/libp2p/py-libp2p/pull/1072

item.title: Rust async pattern -- single owner IO
item.description: Ran into an issue while building my experimental p2p stack in Rust – multiple parts of the code wanted &mut TcpStream. Turned out the design was improper. What worked for me was creating a single IO task owning the socket, with everything else communication via mpsc. Cleaner ownership, fewer borrow issues, and easier to reason about.

item.title: Got a Raspberry Pi 5
item.description:
Bought a Raspberry PI 5.

Planning to do some networking experiments and small infrstructure setups.

item.title: Started writing a p2p stack in Rust
item.description: Started writing an experimental p2p stack, rnet inspired from libp2p specs, to dig deeper into rust and core p2p mechanics.

item.title: Hackathon win @ETHNewDelhi'25
item.description: Attended an IRL hackathon in New Delhi. Built a p2p federated learning platform using libp2p(-py), Akave-O3 and Hedera hashgraph. Won the Filecoin/Akave track at ETHNewDelhi'25.

item.title: Selected for Protocol Labs Dev Guild
item.description:
Got selected for Protocol Labs Dev Guild.

Excited to go deeper into p2p infrascture and libp2p ecosystem.

item.title: Learning document on iptables
item.description: Found a great document to learn about firewall management and iptables in deep.

item.title: Built a VPN gateway with Wireguard
item.description:
Built a VPN gateway using Wireguard, Docker and a nginx server, restricting the server access to only allow wireguard-client IP addresses by modifying the firefall rules for the docker network.

It was fun, wrote a blog about this.

item.title: Build on AI-agents for the first time
item.description: First working with AI agents, built a loyalty platform on NEAR blockchain by using Near AI-agent kit for agent driven user interaction, and smart contract execution. Had fun.

item.title: Weekend hackathon win
item.description: Participated in a hackathon over the weekend. Built a cool event hosting platform on Vara blockchain. Won a 1st prize in the beginner track. Getting more comfortable working under tight constraints.

item.title: Pool prize at @ETHIndia'24 hackathon
item.description: Attended an IRL hackthon in Bangalore. Won a pool prize building on Lit Protocol’s decetralized encryption/decryption API.

item.title: Wrote on Nillion's Blind Computation API
item.description: Wrote a blog on my contribution to our project in @EthOnline'24 hackthon, on Nillion’s blind computation API.

item.title: Hackathon win @EthSingapore'24
item.description: First time travel to Singapore, amazing country. Won a prize building on Oasis ROFL API with team.

item.title: Hackathon win @EthOnline'24
item.description: Participated in my first hackathon. Won a prize in Nillion track building on its blind compuation API.

item.title: Completed Summer of Bitcoin '24
item.description:
Got selected for Summer of Bitcoin 2024, contributing to Floresta, a lightweight bitcoin client.

Learned a lot about navigating large codebases and p2p mechanics used in decentralized systems.

item.title: First open source fellowship
item.description:
Got selected for Summer of Bitcoin 2024. First real step into working on open source projects in a structured way.

Wrote a blog about the selection process too.
